Bash(cd C:/main/create-manifest-file/server && node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: '../.env' }\); var k = process.env.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY || ''; console.log\('Key present:', k.length > 0\); console.log\('Starts with sk-ant:', k.indexOf\('sk-ant'\) === 0\); console.log\('Length:', k.length\);" 2>&1)

Bash(cd C:/main/create-manifest-file/server && node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\({ path: '../.env' }\); const Anthropic = require\('@anthropic-ai/sdk'\); const client = new Anthropic\(\); client.messages.create\({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 10, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'hi' }] }\).then\(r => console.log\('SUCCESS:', r.content[0].text\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('ERROR:', e.status, e.message\)\);" 2>&1)
